data.title: OSR Holdings Acquires Woori IO for Strategic Expansion
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from OSR Holdings ( (OSRH) ).

On October 13, 2025, OSR Holdings Co., Ltd. (OSRK), a subsidiary of OSR Holdings Inc., entered into an agreement to acquire Woori IO Co., Ltd. (WORIO), a South Korean medical-device company specializing in non-invasive glucose monitoring technology. This acquisition, valued at approximately KRW 15 billion (USD 10.6 million), will make WORIO a wholly owned subsidiary of OSRK, with the transaction expected to close on January 12, 2026. WORIO’s innovative near-infrared spectroscopy platform for needle-free glucose monitoring aligns with OSRH’s strategy to enhance its medical-device platform and capture a share of the global glucose-monitoring market, projected to be worth over $40 billion by 2030. The acquisition is expected to strengthen OSRH’s industry positioning by integrating WORIO’s technology and leveraging its partnership with a major consumer electronics company for clinical development.

More about OSR Holdings

OSR Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: OSRH) is a global healthcare holding company focused on advancing biomedical innovation in health and wellness. Through its subsidiaries, the company engages in immuno-oncology, regenerative biologics, and medical device technologies, aiming to build a portfolio of breakthrough healthcare solutions to improve global health outcomes.

data.title: bioAffinity Technologies Secures Patent for Lung Cancer Detection
data.description:
bioAffinity Technologies, Inc. ( (BIAF) ) has issued an update.

On October 16, 2025, bioAffinity Technologies, Inc. announced it received a notification of allowance from the United States Patent and Trademark Office for a patent titled ‘Detection of Early-Stage Lung Cancer in Sputum using Automated Flow Cytometry and Machine Learning.’ This patent covers a system and method for predicting lung cancer by analyzing patient sputum samples using an AI-built algorithm and flow cytometry platform. This development enhances bioAffinity’s intellectual property portfolio, which includes 18 awarded and 33 pending patents globally, and reinforces its position in the early-stage cancer diagnostics industry. The CyPath® Lung test, integral to this patent, offers high sensitivity and specificity in detecting early-stage lung cancer, potentially improving patient outcomes and reducing healthcare costs.

data.title: Viavi Solutions Completes Acquisition of Spirent Communications
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Viavi Solutions ( (VIAV) ).

On October 16, 2025, Viavi Solutions Inc. completed its acquisition of Spirent Communications plc’s high-speed ethernet, network security, and channel emulation testing business from Keysight Technologies, Inc. The acquisition, valued at $425 million, is expected to enhance Viavi’s Network Service Enablement revenue by approximately $180 million in the first year and be accretive to non-GAAP EPS. To finance the acquisition, Viavi entered into a $600 million term loan credit agreement with Wells Fargo, with the loan maturing in 2032.
